title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
summary_full: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
summary_public: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
